steps.title: Spot the key clue
steps.content: The phrase “opaque subject matter” is decisive. Opaque means unclear or hard to see through. Combined with “strange images” and “experimental syntax,” it establishes why engaging with these poems is difficult.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is understanding or explaining what poems mean. Interpret directly expresses this — to interpret means to understand or explain meaning.
The other three describe unrelated actions: assigning work to others, creating written pieces, or formally rejecting something.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
